Aries.approach_to_decisions: fast and instinctive; acts before deliberating
Aries.stress_response: moves faster, picks fights, struggles to sit still

Taurus.core_traits: grounded, sensual, patient, loyal, resistant to change
Taurus.approach_to_decisions: slow, deliberate; trusts the gut and the senses
Taurus.emotional_style: steady, holds feelings close, expresses through care
Taurus.stress_response: retreats into comfort, food, familiar routines

Gemini.approach_to_decisions: intellectualizes; seeks more information, may delay choice
Gemini.emotional_style: talks feelings out; needs to articulate to understand
Gemini.stress_response: talks more, scrolls more, distracts with novelty

Cancer.shadow_traits: moody, clingy, self-protective to the point of withdrawal
Cancer.approach_to_decisions: feels into it; checks emotional resonance over logic
Cancer.emotional_style: deeply felt internally, selectively shown externally
Cancer.stress_response: withdraws into shell, seeks home, holds grudges

Leo.shadow_traits: prideful, attention-seeking, struggles when not seen
Leo.approach_to_decisions: guided by heart and identity; what does this say about who I am?
Leo.emotional_style: expressive and theatrical; wears heart on sleeve
Leo.stress_response: performs confidence, sulks if unrecognized, needs reassurance

Virgo.approach_to_decisions: analyzes exhaustively; lists pros and cons; fears the wrong choice
Virgo.emotional_style: intellectualizes feelings; expresses through acts of service
Virgo.stress_response: over-organizes, ruminates, criticizes self and others

Libra.approach_to_decisions: weighs all sides endlessly; struggles to commit alone
Libra.emotional_style: smooths surfaces; suppresses negative emotion to keep peace
Libra.stress_response: freezes between options, defers to others, avoids confrontation

Scorpio.approach_to_decisions: investigates beneath surface; trusts instinct after deep scrutiny
Scorpio.emotional_style: feels intensely, reveals selectively, trusts slowly
Scorpio.stress_response: withdraws into investigation, fixates, may cut ties

Sagittarius.approach_to_decisions: follows the bigger picture; chases meaning over security
Sagittarius.emotional_style: expresses through ideas and stories; uncomfortable in stuck feelings
Sagittarius.stress_response: escapes — travels, philosophizes, leaves the situation

Capricorn.approach_to_decisions: long-term strategy; what advances the goal? what's sustainable?
Capricorn.stress_response: works harder, controls more, suppresses needs

Aquarius.approach_to_decisions: principles over emotions; what's logically consistent and forward-looking?
Aquarius.emotional_style: observes feelings from above; uncomfortable with displays

Pisces.shadow_traits: escapist, boundary-less, dissolves into others' emotions
Pisces.approach_to_decisions: intuitive; senses the right path more than reasons it
Pisces.emotional_style: absorbs the room; feels others' emotions as own
Pisces.stress_response: escapes into fantasy, art, sleep, or merges with someone else's reality
